name: Database Concurrent Logins from Multiple Locations
notes: Reports when there are a number of authentications to a database server across many Remote IPs
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success with the same destination IP more than 5 times
conditions_text: when the source is Remote
when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Database Servers, BB:HostReference: Database Servers
when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success with the same destination IP more than 5 times, across more than 5 source IP within 10 minutes
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success with the same destination IP more than 5 times, across more than 5 source IP within 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Database Concurrent Logins from Multiple Locations on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the source is Remote
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Database Servers, BB:HostReference: Database Servers
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success with the same destination IP more than 5 times, across more than 5 source IP within 10 minutes
RED_list: Event description: Reports when there are a number of authentications to a database server across many Remote IPs
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Destination IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
